title: No lint script configured
evidence: package.json scripts: build, start, test, test:watch — no lint entry
suggestion: Add eslint or biome for static analysis

title: Extra MCP tools beyond spec requirements
evidence: src/server.ts:27-355 registers 18 tools including list_teams, list_competitions, list_seasons, team_competitions, team_recent_matches, last_match_between, champion, relegated, top_scoring_teams, best_record — well beyond the 12 required capabilities
suggestion: No action needed; additional tools enrich the query surface

title: Comprehensive team name normalization with alias table
evidence: src/normalize.ts:15-61 defines ~40 aliases covering state suffixes, spelling variants (atletico/athletico), and common abbreviations
suggestion: No action needed; addresses the Data Quality Notes from the spec

title: Multi-format date parsing covers all CSV date formats
evidence: src/dates.ts:3-17 handles ISO (YYYY-MM-DD), datetime with time, and Brazilian (DD/MM/YYYY) formats as required by the spec
suggestion: No action needed; directly addresses spec requirement for date format handling
